headline: American Water Continues Commitment to Advancing Utility Resilience; Achieves Utility Resilience Goal Five Years Early
summary: American Water (NYSE: AWK), the nation's largest regulated water and wastewater utility in the U.S., announced today that it achieved its resilience goal that uses the American Water Works Association's (AWWA) Utility Resilience Index (URI) as a metric as of year-end 2025, marking a milestone in the company's overall efforts to strengthen its ability to respond to emergencies and extreme weather events.
